title: PortfolioMembershipCompact
description: This object determines if a user is a member of a portfolio.

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

parent.description: The portfolio the user is a member of.

access_level.description: Whether the member has admin, editor, or viewer access to the portfolio. Portfolios do not support commenter access yet.
